entries.current_position: PF-C01-M01 remains proven with carry-forwards and PF-C01-M02 remains next. Missions #283 and #285 define the Cloud Atlas topology plus Apollo/Hermes endpoint, isolation, source, reinstall, degraded-mode, and recovery proof plan. Apollo commissioning, native workflows, private route, Hermes proof, Windows recovery, protected execution, and PF-C01-M02 exit remain unproven.
blockers: Apollo is not yet commissioned and proven as the Windows orchestration endpoint.
Windows-specific Codex continuity has not yet been evacuated from Prometheus to Apollo.
The independent Hermes portable command and administration route has not yet received mission evidence.
Windows recovery media, system-image disposition, and manufacturer-driver preservation remain unresolved.
Extended memory testing and bounded stability follow-up remain pending.
entries.next_action: Obtain separate protected Execute authority and prove the exact Apollo/Hermes and Windows continuity requirements before any PF-C01-M02 exit or destructive-action Preview.
entries.next_approval: Jayson must separately authorize endpoint commissioning and migration, then separately authorize any destructive Windows, Proxmox, Plex, Jellyfin, Gitea, or infrastructure action.

entries.current_position: Notum's Watch remains READY_FOR_JAYSON_EXECUTION_PACKAGE. Mission #313 refines the planned Citadel Linux watchtower baseline: Uptime Kuma, conditional NUT telemetry, independent internet usability checks, direct Zeus alerts, and Prometheus/Grafana independence. Notum has returned to the Citadel, but Linux installation, UPS connection, telemetry, alerts, and continuity actions remain unproven and separately authorized.
blockers: Protected Linux installation, UPS identity/cabling proof, telemetry activation, alert-provider selection, and runtime execution remain Jayson-side.
entries.next_action: After merged-main readback, prepare the bounded NW-C01 Jayson execution package for hardware preservation, minimal Linux installation, NUT/Uptime Kuma proof, and direct-alert testing without automatic shutdown or startup authority.
entries.next_approval: Jayson execution and protected evidence readback.

entries.current_position: Prime Ascendant remains at PA-C01 under Operation Harmony. Mission #313 defines Harmony's primary Coppermind domain, Emberdark's structured API/MCP and crossing fabric, transport-neutral Perpendicularity, private Gitea/public GitHub boundaries, HAOS support limits, and the Prometheus/Grafana versus Notum/Uptime Kuma placement direction. Harmony VM and Atlas VM directions remain unproven; runtime, connector activation, deployment, recovery proof, and later gates remain unadvanced.
blockers: Application contracts, database layout, backup/restore, parity, and cutover evidence remain unproven.
Repository visibility and settings remain unchanged and outside this campaign; no settings action is authorized.
entries.next_action: Continue PA-C01 covenant review and the later PA-C02/PA-C03 contract design without treating Coppermind, Emberdark, Perpendicularity transports, MCP, Gitea, HAOS support, or monitoring placement as deployment evidence or cutover authority.
entries.next_approval: Jayson must separately approve any later PA-C01 gate advancement and any runtime, infrastructure, Gitea cutover, route-retirement, visibility, settings, or merge action.
